segments.text: Good afternoon everybody and welcome to Riverside Industrial Village.
segments.translation: 大家下午好，欢迎来到滨江工业村。

segments.text: To start your visit, I'm just going to give you a brief account of the history of the museum before letting you roam about on your own.
segments.translation: 参观开始前，首先容我在你们自由游览前简短介绍下博物馆的历史。

segments.text: I won't keep you long.
segments.translation: 不会耽误大家很长时间，

segments.text: OK?
segments.translation: 可以吗？

segments.text: Now, from where we're standing you've got a good view of the river over there.
segments.translation: 现在我们所站的地方，你们可以将对岸河景尽收眼底。

segments.text: And it was because of this fast-flowing water that this site was a natural place for manufacturing works.
segments.translation: 因为水流急，这里是生产工作的天然地点

segments.text: The water and the availability of raw materials in the area, like minerals and iron ore, and also the abundance of local fuels, like coal and firewood, all made this site suitable for industry from a very early time.
segments.translation: 水，还有这个区域的原材料例如矿物和铁矿，还有丰富的本地燃料，例如煤和炭。这些都使这里成为早期工业的合适地点。

segments.text: Water was the main source of power for the early industries and some of the water wheels were first established in the twelfth century, would you believe?
segments.translation: 早期工业主要靠水力提供能源，你信吗？早在12世纪这里就有水磨了。

segments.text: At that time, local craftsmen first built an iron forge just behind the village here, on the bend in the river.
segments.translation: 那个时候，本地工匠在村后河的转弯处首先建了一个炼铁炉。

segments.text: By the seventeenth and eighteenth centuries the region's rivers supported more than a hundred and sixty water mills - and many of these continued to operate well into the nineteenth century.
segments.translation: 到17和18世纪，这带河流支持超过160个水磨，直到19世纪，其中有很多还运作良好。

segments.text: But then the steam engine was invented and then the railways came and the centres of industry were able to move away from the rivers and the countryside and into the towns.
segments.translation: 但是后来发明了蒸汽机，随后火车的引入，工业的中心从河边和郊区迁移到镇上，

segments.text: So, industrial villages like this one became very rare.
segments.translation: 所以像这样的工业村变得很罕见。

segments.text: So that's the history for you.
segments.translation: 这就是它的历史了。

segments.text: If you'd like any more information, you can ask me some questions, or you can read further in our excellent guide book.
segments.translation: 如果你想要更多信息，可以提问或者阅读下我们很棒的游览手册。

segments.text: Now I'm going to give you a plan of the site and I'd just like to point out where everything is and then you can take a look at everything for yourself.
segments.translation: 现在我给大家介绍下分布图，告诉大家具体位置，然后你们可以自行参观。

segments.text: I've already pointed out the river, which is on the left.
segments.translation: 我之前已经指出河在左边。

segments.text: And of course, running along the bottom is Woodside Road, got it?
segments.translation: 当然沿河到底是Woodside路。明白吗？

segments.text: OK.
segments.translation: 好，

segments.text: Now we're standing at the entrance, see it at the bottom, and immediately to our right is the Ticket Office.
segments.translation: 现在我们所在的位置是入口。看，在图的最底下。右手边就是售票处。

segments.text: You won't need that because you've got your group booking, but just past it are the toilets - always good to know where they are.
segments.translation: 你们是团购，所以不需理会售票处。过了售票处就是厕所，提前知道总是好的。

segments.text: In front of us is the car park, as you can see, and to the left, by the entry gate is the Gift Shop.
segments.translation: 在我们前方是停车场，它左边就是礼品店的入口。

segments.text: That's where you can get copies of the guide, like this one here.
segments.translation: 在那可以买到像这本一样的引导手册。

segments.text: Now, beyond the car park all the buildings are arranged in a half circle with a yard in the middle.
segments.translation: 现在看到停车场前面，所有的建筑物都是以中间的庭院为中心，呈半圆型分布。

segments.text: The big, stone building at the top is the main Workshop.
segments.translation: 最顶的那个大石头建筑就是主要的作坊。

segments.text: That's where the furnace is and where all the metal was smelted and the tools were cast, as you'll be able to see.
segments.translation: 炼铁炉就在这里，所有的金属在这熔炼，工具也在这铸造，后面你可以看到。

segments.text: Now, in the top right-hand corner, that building with bigger windows is the Showroom, where samples of all the tools that were made through the ages are on display.
segments.translation: 现在看到右上角，那个窗户稍大的建筑就是展示厅。那个时期所锻造的工具样本都在那展出。

segments.text: In the top left corner is the Grinding Shop, where the tools were sharpened and finished.
segments.translation: 在左上角是打磨作坊，所有工具在那进行磨尖和完成。

segments.text: And on one side of that you can see the Engine Room and on the other is the Cafe, which isn't an antique, you'll be pleased to know, though they do serve very nice old-fashioned teas.
segments.translation: 在打磨作坊的一边是引擎房，另一边就是咖啡厅，咖啡厅不是古董，知道这点你们应该会很开心，尽管咖啡厅供应传统茶饮。

segments.text: The row of buildings you can see on the left are the cottages.
segments.translation: 在左边那排建筑是小木屋。

segments.text: These were built for the workers towards the end of the eighteenth century and they're still furnished from that period so you can get a good idea of ordinary people's living conditions.
segments.translation: 这些小木屋在18世纪末为工匠们建造，现在依然沿用旧时的布置，所以你可以很一目了然的知道当时人们的居住环境。

segments.text: Across the yard from them, you can see the stables where the horses were kept for transporting the products.
segments.translation: 穿过庭院就是马厩。负责运送货物的马匹都饲养在这。

segments.text: And the separate building in front of them is the Works Office and that still has some of the old accounts on display.
segments.translation: 马厩前的独立建筑是事务办公室。这里依然有一些老账户本展出。

segments.text: Right, if anyone wants a guided tour then I'm starting at the Engine Room.
segments.translation: 好了，如果有人需要导游陪同参观，我会从引擎房开始讲解。

segments.text: If you'd like to come along, this way please, ladies and gentlemen.
segments.translation: 请跟我来，女士们先生们。
